description: This Java class defines a REST controller for officer-related APIs in a Spring Boot application, including endpoints for queue listing, application details, decision overrides, and audit log queries.

classes.name: OfficerController
classes.description: Controller providing officer-related API endpoints for managing loan applications and audit logs.

methods.name: queue
methods.description: Returns a list of submitted applications for officer review, with optional status and decision filters.

methods.name: applicationDetail
methods.description: Retrieves full details of a specific application draft by UUID.

methods.name: overrideDecision
methods.description: Allows an officer to override an application's decision and logs an audit event.

methods.name: auditLog
methods.description: Queries audit events within a specified time range, with optional filters for event type and user ID, supporting pagination.

methods.name: toAuditResponse
methods.description: Converts an AuditEvent entity to its API response DTO.

methods.name: parseInstantOrNull
methods.description: Parses a string into an Instant, or returns null if input is blank or invalid.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts and validates the user ID (UUID) from the Authentication object.
